description_long: This is a wooden spice rack with a sturdy, arched handle for easy carrying and six internal compartments arranged in a grid pattern. The sides are thick and feature a decorative oval plaque with engraved text, as well as a metal bottle opener attached near the top. The front and back panels have two horizontal rails, adding both structural support and visual interest. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the rack a rustic, handcrafted appearance. The open design allows for easy access to the compartments, which are currently empty.
description: A rustic wooden spice rack with a handle, six grid compartments, decorative side plaques, and a metal bottle opener.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the arched handle, six compartments, decorative plaque, and metal bottle opener.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the handle, side plaque, and the bottle opener more prominently.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the handle, compartments, and the opposite side of the rack.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on the handle, side plaque, and the bottle opener from a different angle.
